name: xiaoduiyou-runtime-skills
description: Xiaoduiyou runtime skills for Codex IM, content-package, Growth Diary, and public feedback-handler issue workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Xiaoduiyou IM, document, Growth Diary, and public feedback-handler workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installs the Xiaoduiyou runtime skills that define IM message handling, visual card delivery, document and content-package creation, Growth Diary read/write behavior, and public feedback-handler issue triage for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Write a Xiaoduiyou Growth Diary record.
Triage a Xiaoduiyou public feedback-handler session with session_purpose: feedback.
